assertions.assertion: Recommends setting options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false in test configuration
assertions.rationale: Does not mention options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false; only suggests AddDeveloperSigningCredential()

assertions.assertion: Recommends AddDeveloperSigningCredential(persistKey: false) to avoid disk writes
assertions.rationale: Calls AddDeveloperSigningCredential() without persistKey: false parameter

assertions.assertion: Warns against hard-coding localhost ports — use factory.CreateClient() BaseAddress instead
assertions.rationale: Warns against hard-coding localhost:5001 and recommends factory.CreateClient()

assertions.assertion: Mentions the risk of sharing HttpClient or ClaimsProvider state across parallel tests
assertions.rationale: Mentions static state leaking between tests but does not specifically address HttpClient or ClaimsProvider sharing
